revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->

| mapframe = yes

| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan

| coordinates = {{coord|37.741771|139.173709}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Hachiman|lt=Hachiman|ar|هاتشيمان|az|Haçiman|ca|Hachiman|de|Hachiman|el|Χατσίμαν|en|Hachiman|es|Hachiman|eu|Hachiman|fa|هاچیمان|fi|Hachiman|fr|Hachiman|hu|Hacsiman|id|Hachiman|it|Hachiman|ja|八幡神|ko|하치만 신|mni|ꯍꯆꯤꯃꯥꯟ|my|ဟချိမန်း|pl|Hachiman|pt|Hachiman|ru|Хатиман|simple|Hachiman|sl|Hačiman|sv|Hachiman|tr|Hachiman|uk|Хачіман|uz|Hachiman|vi|Hachiman|wuu|八幡神|zh|八幡神|qid=Q261637|1=Hachiman}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Co-Enshrinement of Utsurahashino Shrine Ronsha 2'''|五泉八幡宮（合祀）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Q11412524|ltq=Q11412524|qid=Q11412524|1=Co-Enshrinement}}
* {{ill|Q11390939|ltq=Q11390939|qid=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province|ja|越後国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11636502|1=List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province}}
** Series ordinal: 31
** P155: {{ill|Q135040456|ltq=Q135040456|qid=Q135040456|1=Awomino Shrine (Q135040456)}}
** P156: {{ill|Ikureno Shrine|lt=Ikureno Shrine|qid=Q135040458|1=Ikureno Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q666514|ltq=Q666514|qid=Q666514|1=Echigo Province}}
* {{ill|Q11621281|ltq=Q11621281|qid=Q11621281|1=Kanbara district}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|37.741771|139.173709}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

== dedicated to (P825) ==

* {{ill|Q261637|ltq=Q261637|qid=Q261637|1=Hachiman}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 182449
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Utsurahashino Shrine|lt=Utsurahashino Shrine|qid=Q135040457|1=Utsurahashino Shrine}}
** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
